zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian Ferch Einion於0956年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素時，她的父親King Einion ab Owain21歲，母親Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan22歲。她與Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1005年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian Ferch Einion于0956年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素时，她的父亲King Einion ab Owain21岁，母亲Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan22岁。她与Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1005年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Pinning (see Penning ) with -ion substituted for -in(g), perhaps through false association with the word pinion ‘wing, feather’. Compare Pinyan .

variants.name: Penning
meanings: English, Dutch, and North German: from early Middle English penning, Low German penning, Middle Dutch penninc ‘penny’ (see Penny ), a topographic name (from a field name) or a nickname referring to tax dues of a penny.
South German: from the short form, Panno, of an ancient Germanic personal name derived from a word meaning ‘ban, order, command’.
English: from a Middle English personal name Pening, Pining, presumably representing an unrecorded Old English name, a pet form perhaps of Penda or of names like Pendhere and Pendwulf.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian Ferch Einion was born in 0956, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, King Einion ab Owain, was 21 and her mother, Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, was 22. She married Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1005, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian Ferch Einion est née en 0956, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, King Einion ab Owain, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1005, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian Ferch Einion 0956 in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Einion ab Owain 21 und ihre Mutter Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan 22. Sie hat in Wales, United Kingdom Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1005 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

Lei sposato Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1005, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Ferch Einionが0956年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで生まれた時，父King Einion ab Owainは21歳，母Queen Nest ferch Gwerystanは22歳であった。イギリスウェールズでElystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1005年にフランスピカーディソンメで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Ferch Einion(이)가 0956년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Einion ab Owain(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스에서 Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1005년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian Ferch Einion nasceu em 0956, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, King Einion ab Owain, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1005, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian Ferch Einion родилась в 0956 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени King Einion ab Owain было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1005 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1005, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 49 años.
